diagnoses.name: Severe sepsis with septic shock
diagnoses.evidence_span: Severe sepsis with septic shock developed secondary to gram-negative infection

diagnoses.name: Acute pancreatitis
diagnoses.evidence_span: admitted with other specified sepsis progressing to severe sepsis with septic shock secondary to acute pancreatitis

diagnoses.name: Alcohol induced acute pancreatitis
diagnoses.evidence_span: acute pancreatitis. Patient with multiple complicating factors...related to chronic alcohol dependence

diagnoses.name: Acute kidney injury
diagnoses.evidence_span: Acute kidney injury progressed requiring careful fluid management and electrolyte repletion

diagnoses.name: Protein-calorie malnutrition
diagnoses.evidence_span: cachexia with unspecified protein-calorie malnutrition

diagnoses.name: Metabolic acidosis
diagnoses.evidence_span: Metabolic acidosis was present with pH 7.21 and base deficit of -8

diagnoses.name: Wet beriberi
diagnoses.evidence_span: Findings consistent with wet beriberi (thiamine deficiency) and polyneuropathy were noted on examination

diagnoses.name: Thiamine deficiency
diagnoses.evidence_span: Findings consistent with wet beriberi (thiamine deficiency)

diagnoses.name: Alcoholic hepatitis without ascites
diagnoses.evidence_span: Alcoholic hepatitis without ascites documented on clinical and laboratory grounds

diagnoses.name: Chronic kidney disease
diagnoses.evidence_span: chronic kidney disease

diagnoses.name: Hypertensive chronic kidney disease
diagnoses.evidence_span: Chronic conditions including hypertensive chronic kidney disease

diagnoses.name: Alcohol dependence
diagnoses.evidence_span: alcohol dependence complicated by hepatitis

diagnoses.name: Anemia
diagnoses.evidence_span: Hgb 7.2 g/dL (anemia noted)...Anemia requiring transfusion support

diagnoses.name: Disorientation
diagnoses.evidence_span: Patient displayed disorientation upon admission

diagnoses.name: Hypothyroidism
diagnoses.evidence_span: extensive comorbidities including hypothyroidism

diagnoses.name: Gout
diagnoses.evidence_span: extensive comorbidities including hypothyroidism and gout

diagnoses.name: Asthma
diagnoses.evidence_span: History of tobacco use and asthma also documented

diagnoses.name: Prior venous thromboembolism
diagnoses.evidence_span: Patient has had prior venous thromboembolic events

diagnoses.name: Status post bariatric surgery
diagnoses.evidence_span: prior bariatric surgery

diagnoses.name: Magnesium deficiency
diagnoses.evidence_span: magnesium 1.4...electrolyte repletion

diagnoses.name: Polyneuropathy
diagnoses.evidence_span: Findings consistent with wet beriberi (thiamine deficiency) and polyneuropathy were noted on examination

procedures.name: Percutaneous central venous catheter placement (Superior Vena Cava)
procedures.evidence_span: Percutaneous central venous catheter (Infusion Device into Superior Vena Cava) placed for hemodynamic monitoring and medication administration

procedures.name: CT abdomen/pelvis
procedures.evidence_span: CT abdomen/pelvis revealed acute pancreatitis with peripancreatic fluid collection

medications.name: Heparin
medications.evidence_span: Heparin 5,000 units SC BID (VTE prophylaxis given history)

medications.name: Thiamine
medications.dosage: 100 mg PO daily and 500 mg IV daily
medications.evidence_span: Thiamine 100 mg PO daily and thiamine 500 mg IV daily (beriberi treatment)

medications.name: Vitamin B complex
medications.evidence_span: Vitamin B complex 1 cap PO/NG daily

medications.name: Multivitamins with minerals
medications.evidence_span: Multivitamins with minerals 1 tab PO daily

medications.name: Magnesium oxide
medications.evidence_span: Magnesium oxide 400 mg PO/NG daily and magnesium sulfate 4 gm IV (repletion)

medications.name: Lorazepam
medications.evidence_span: Lorazepam 1-0.5 mg PO/NG for anxiety/alcohol withdrawal

medications.name: Hydromorphone
medications.evidence_span: Hydromorphone 0.25-0.5 mg IV or 1-2 mg PO/NG q4-6h prn pain

medications.name: Ondansetron
medications.evidence_span: Ondansetron 4 mg IV q8h prn nausea

medications.name: Fluticasone propionate nasal spray
medications.evidence_span: Fluticasone propionate nasal spray 1 spray each nostril daily

medications.name: Artificial tears
medications.evidence_span: Artificial tears 1-2 drops to both eyes TID prn

chief_complaint: Abdominal pain with acute severe illness
